creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reopening the bug. Bartek, this looks like you may have committed an old version of your patches or code.

We used to have a discussion here, https://reviews.freebsd.org/D1382#5 and some of the issues that you'd already solved resurfaced in 
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/Tools/scripts/bump-revision.sh?r1=380431&r2=380430&pathrev=380431

For instance, the  if [ $? == ... ] bashism (== instead of =) and the removal of the check for the three-state grep exit code (0 = found, 1 = not found, 2 = error) are back.

Please see if you find/pull the newer version from the Phabricator (reviews.f.o) and commit the newer one instead.

Thank you.
